'''Leemoth''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] surgeon who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He specialized in amphibious and semi-aquatic species. He survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center, and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]] was moved to a new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] had become useless, Leemoth and the rest of the personnel left Drongar.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
*{{InsiderCite|83|MedStar: Intermezzo|reprint=1}}
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
